title: Wavin India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Wavin India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Wavin India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wavin India:
Wavin India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wavin India!
